items.title: Watch League 1: Peterhead v Inverness CT
items.summary: Join BBC Alba for live League 1 football action as Peterhead host Inverness CT.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Italy to host Wimbledon tuneup on grass in 2028
items.summary: The Italian Tennis and Padel Federation has purchased the rights to an ATP event in Brussels with plans to stage a Wimbledon tuneup on grass courts in June 2028.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: NASCAR Power Rankings: Ty Gibbs Moves On Up After 1st Cup Win
items.summary: Ty Gibbs made a jump up the power rankings after finally getting his first victory in the NASCAR Cup Series.
